top3.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Laboratory.ID
FROM Laboratory
LEFT JOIN Examination ON Laboratory.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE Examination.Thrombosis IS NULL
  AND (Laboratory.CPK < (SELECT MIN(CPK) * 0.9 FROM Laboratory) 
       OR Laboratory.CPK > (SELECT MAX(CPK) * 1.1 FROM Laboratory));

SELECT DISTINCT Laboratory.ID
FROM Laboratory
LEFT JOIN Examination ON Laboratory.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE Examination.Thrombosis IS NULL
  AND (Laboratory.CPK < (SELECT MIN(CPK) * 0.9 FROM Laboratory) 
       OR Laboratory.CPK > (SELECT MAX(CPK) * 1.1 FROM Laboratory));

SELECT DISTINCT E.ID
FROM Examination E
INNER JOIN Laboratory L ON E.ID = L.ID
WHERE E.Thrombosis IS NULL
  AND L.CPK NOT BETWEEN 
      (SELECT AVG(CPK) - 2 * AVG(CPK - (SELECT AVG(CPK) FROM Laboratory)) FROM Laboratory WHERE CPK IS NOT NULL)
      AND 
      (SELECT AVG(CPK) + 2 * AVG(CPK - (SELECT AVG(CPK) FROM Laboratory)) FROM Laboratory WHERE CPK IS NOT NULL);

SELECT DISTINCT Laboratory.ID
FROM Laboratory
LEFT JOIN Examination ON Laboratory.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE Examination.Thrombosis IS NULL
  AND (Laboratory.CPK < (SELECT MIN(CPK) * 0.9 FROM Laboratory) 
       OR Laboratory.CPK > (SELECT MAX(CPK) * 1.1 FROM Laboratory));

SELECT DISTINCT E.ID
FROM Examination E
INNER JOIN Laboratory L ON E.ID = L.ID
WHERE E.Thrombosis IS NULL
  AND L.CPK NOT BETWEEN 
      (SELECT AVG(CPK) - 2 * AVG(CPK - (SELECT AVG(CPK) FROM Laboratory)) FROM Laboratory WHERE CPK IS NOT NULL)
      AND 
      (SELECT AVG(CPK) + 2 * AVG(CPK - (SELECT AVG(CPK) FROM Laboratory)) FROM Laboratory WHERE CPK IS NOT NULL);

SELECT DISTINCT E.ID
FROM Examination E
INNER JOIN Laboratory L ON E.ID = L.ID
WHERE E.Thrombosis IS NULL
  AND L.CPK < (SELECT AVG(CPK) - 2 * AVG(ABS(CPK - (SELECT AVG(CPK) FROM Laboratory WHERE CPK IS NOT NULL))) FROM Laboratory WHERE CPK IS NOT NULL)
   OR L.CPK > (SELECT AVG(CPK) + 2 * AVG(ABS(CPK - (SELECT AVG(CPK) FROM Laboratory WHERE CPK IS NOT NULL))) FROM Laboratory WHERE CPK IS NOT NULL);

final.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Laboratory.ID
FROM Laboratory
LEFT JOIN Examination ON Laboratory.ID = Examination.ID
WHERE Examination.Thrombosis IS NULL
  AND (Laboratory.CPK < (SELECT MIN(CPK) * 0.9 FROM Laboratory) 
       OR Laboratory.CPK > (SELECT MAX(CPK) * 1.1 FROM Laboratory));
